title: PUT partial-update cannot clear fields or set year to 0
evidence: app.go:173-188 updateBookHandler substitutes existing values whenever a request field is the zero value, so year=0 or an intentionally-empty title/author/isbn is silently ignored
suggestion: Use pointer fields (*string/*int) in UpdateBookRequest to distinguish 'omitted' from 'set to zero'

title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: app.go:92-125 listBooksHandler returns the full table unconditionally; no ?limit/?offset
suggestion: Not required by TASK.md — noted for cross-run comparison only

title: On-disk books.db created in the working directory at startup
evidence: app.go:43 sql.Open("sqlite3", "./books.db") — the running server writes a persistent DB file into cwd (tests correctly use :memory:)
suggestion: Make the DB path configurable via env var for deployment hygiene; no correctness impact

title: Low idiomatic score despite clean code
evidence: scores.json idiomatic=0.32 while code_quality=0.956 and maintainability=0.939 — likely a scorer artifact (single-file layout, gofmt alignment), not a code defect
suggestion: No action; flagged so the low idiomatic metric is not read as a code problem
